e652c81b-e833-4933-80ba-ed19d75a67c4.label: text_chunk
e652c81b-e833-4933-80ba-ed19d75a67c4.text:
(A) The parties wish to enter into business discussions and pursuant thereto each of the parties wish to  disclose  confidential  information  to  the  other  party  hereto  about  their  own  intellectual  property, business affairs and methods of work.(B) The parties wish to regulate how such confidential information is to be treated in order to protect the party owning such confidential information.

1.

77454d4c-b59b-4f0b-9b1d-f63781a49649.label: text_chunk
77454d4c-b59b-4f0b-9b1d-f63781a49649.text:
DEFINITIONS

“Purpose” shall mean the purpose referred to in recital A.“Confidential Information” shall mean all information in whatever form, whether imparted orally or in writing or by other medium including all copies of the same which one party hereto discloses to the other pursuant to the Purpose.“Disclosing Party” shall mean a party hereto who discloses its Confidential Information to the other Party hereto.“Receiving Party” shall mean a party hereto who receives Confidential Information.

368fb8fa-a812-4d73-a875-5f47671c571b.label: text_chunk
368fb8fa-a812-4d73-a875-5f47671c571b.text:
Copyright © 2015 Acumen Business Systems Ltd www.acumensystems.com
Page 1 of 5

2. USE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

2.1. A Receiving Party agrees:

2.1.1.

1. to keep the Confidential Information of the other strictly confidential and not copy, supply or make the same available to any person other than as permitted in Clauses 2.1.2 and 2.1.3 below;

eb1dbb22-0a57-4838-8640-5328ca0926c4.label: text_chunk
eb1dbb22-0a57-4838-8640-5328ca0926c4.text:
2.1.2. to use the Confidential Information of the other solely in,

 and to the extent necessary for the Purpose and not to copy or use any Confidential Information of the other save to the extent necessary for the Purpose;

2.1.3.

 not to disclose any Confidential Information to any person or entity other than to such of its employees who need to know for the Purpose (“Permitted Disclosees”),

028ef285-f335-40cf-b3bf-8f9b660a4697.label: text_chunk
028ef285-f335-40cf-b3bf-8f9b660a4697.text:
provided that the Receiving Party shall ensure that its Permitted Disclosees keep all Confidential Information confidential and only use it on the terms of this Agreement, as if such Permitted Disclosees were party to this Agreement.

3. CARE

3.1. Without prejudice to the generality of Clause 2,

 the Receiving Party shall exercise no less a degree of care in protecting the Confidential Information than which it uses to protect its own information of like sensitivity and importance.

2de3ba60-edd5-4d57-bf06-2a18c21366f8.label: text_chunk
2de3ba60-edd5-4d57-bf06-2a18c21366f8.text:
4. EXCLUSIONS

4.1. The provisions of this Agreement shall not apply to information:

4.1.1.

1. publicly available prior to the date of this Agreement or that is made publicly available on or after the date of this Agreement by the Disclosing Party without restriction;

4.1.2.

 that is independently obtained by the Receiving Party without breach by it of any obligation of confidentiality;

4.1.3.

db0b378d-d347-4773-97f7-0088e9ff3202.label: text_chunk
db0b378d-d347-4773-97f7-0088e9ff3202.text:
already in the Receiving Party's possession and was lawfully received from sources other than the Disclosing Party;
Copyright © 2015 Acumen Business Systems Ltd www.acumensystems.com
Page 2 of 5

4.1.4. which is required to be disclosed by law, provided that,

 to the extent the Receiving Party is not prohibited from doing so by law,

605b8674-0736-4561-b37a-4539eb667a43.label: text_chunk
605b8674-0736-4561-b37a-4539eb667a43.text:
it undertakes to give the Disclosing Party not less than two business days’ notice of such requirement of disclosure and, to such extent, will make such disclosure in the manner and with the content agreed by the Disclosing Party.If any portion of Confidential Information falls within any of the above exceptions, the remainder shall continue to be subject to the restrictions of this Agreement.

5. COMPLETENESS OF INFORMATION

5.1.

b9edcb88-7019-44cd-b01e-c946446d3691.label: text_chunk
b9edcb88-7019-44cd-b01e-c946446d3691.text:
The Confidential Information is disclosed on an AS IS basis.

 Neither party makes any warranties expressed  or  implied  either  regarding  the  sufficiency  or  completeness  of  the  Confidential Information for any purpose or regarding any infringements which may arise from the use of the Confidential Information.

6. RIGHTS

6.1.

8e43f48a-2ddc-4a37-b1eb-35ded7dac8ba.label: text_chunk
8e43f48a-2ddc-4a37-b1eb-35ded7dac8ba.text:
Neither party shall acquire any intellectual property rights or other right,

 title or interest in any Confidential Information of the other as a result of or in connection with this Agreement.

6.2.

4baed00f-4305-418d-87f3-4d754ffa99ab.label: text_chunk
4baed00f-4305-418d-87f3-4d754ffa99ab.text:
Except  as  provided  herein,

  no  right  or  license  whatsoever,  either  expressed  or  implied,  is granted  to  either  party  pursuant  to  this  Agreement  under  any  patent,  patent  application, trademark, copyright or other proprietary right now or hereafter owned or controlled by the other party.

7. RETURN OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

7.1.

419a677c-efcb-4758-bab7-198533ab2f26.label: text_chunk
419a677c-efcb-4758-bab7-198533ab2f26.text: Each  party  shall  forthwith  upon  request  by  the  other  return  to  the  other  all  Confidential Information (including, without limitation, all summaries, copies and excerpts of Confidential Information), and other information, given to it by the other and shall expunge and destroy all Confidential  Information  from  any  equipment  or  other  device  in  its  possession  or  control.

f2b40f01-3b63-4c3e-b0d2-c7814e2c8859.label: text_chunk
f2b40f01-3b63-4c3e-b0d2-c7814e2c8859.text:
Furthermore, the receiving party shall destroy all copies of analyses, compilations, studies or other documents or derivative works which contain any Confidential Information. Each party shall on request provide a letter signed by a director confirming that it has complied with this clause.Copyright © 2015 Acumen Business Systems Ltd www.acumensystems.com
Page 3 of 5

8. NO WAIVER AND REMEDIES

8.1.

af28be0f-3360-48d4-8cfd-5d437ec69143.label: text_chunk
af28be0f-3360-48d4-8cfd-5d437ec69143.text:
Delay or failure of either party to insist upon or enforce strict performance of any provision of this  Agreement  or  to  exercise  any  right,  power  or  remedy  under  this  Agreement  shall  not operate as a waiver of that provision, right, power or remedy or preclude its exercise later and no single or partial exercise thereof shall preclude any further exercise thereof.

8.2.

1b6a9f5d-7afa-4b03-aa3d-086cb9958fb5.label: text_chunk
1b6a9f5d-7afa-4b03-aa3d-086cb9958fb5.text: Without prejudice to any other rights or remedies which the other party may have (whether or not expressly provided or contemplated in this Agreement), each party acknowledges and agrees that damages may not be an adequate remedy for breach by it of the provisions of this Agreement, and accordingly it agrees that (subject, where applicable, to the discretion of the court) the other party shall be entitled to the remedies of injunction,

1014ad2b-d8ff-4f39-a392-224eb54ab682.label: text_chunk
1014ad2b-d8ff-4f39-a392-224eb54ab682.text:
specific performance and any other equitable relief for any threatened or actual breach of such provisions and no proof of special damages shall be necessary for its enforcement.

8.3. (Notwithstanding Clause 8.

2) each party shall indemnify and keep indemnified the other party against any and all liabilities, claims, expenses, losses and damages suffered or incurred by that other party as a result of any breach by it of its obligations under this Agreement.

9.

725f12b4-d620-488a-8d8e-3e11a0d8d993.label: text_chunk
725f12b4-d620-488a-8d8e-3e11a0d8d993.text:
GENERAL

9.1.

 Each party  confirms that  it  is  entering  into  this Agreement  as  principal and  not  as  agent  or broker for any other party.

9.2.

 Neither party shall assign or transfer this Agreement or any part thereof to any other party

9.3.

4d1dd1ae-626c-4352-b1c9-1234692c4625.label: text_chunk
4d1dd1ae-626c-4352-b1c9-1234692c4625.text:
No change,

 amendment or modification of any provision of this Agreement shall be valid or binding on the parties unless made in writing and signed by a duly authorised representative of each of the parties.

9.4.

 This Agreement shall apply without limit of time to all Confidential Information disclosed in connection with the Purpose.

9.5.

 Headings are inserted in this Agreement for convenience only and no account shall be taken of headings in construing this Agreement.

9.6.

8f5b0503-fa74-45f9-b926-ff46ac6ab8c9.label: text_chunk
8f5b0503-fa74-45f9-b926-ff46ac6ab8c9.text:
If any part or any provision of this Agreement shall to any extent prove invalid or unenforceable in law the remainder of such provision and all other provisions of this Agreement shall remain
Copyright © 2015 Acumen Business Systems Ltd www.acumensystems.com
Page 4 of 5

55f102ea-4775-4097-bc72-edb35ce480c8.label: text_chunk
55f102ea-4775-4097-bc72-edb35ce480c8.text: valid  and  enforceable  to  the  fullest  extent  permissible  by  law,  and  such  provision  shall  be deemed to be omitted from this Agreement to the extent of such invalidity or unenforceability.

03eb9ffe-b3b4-48f0-9503-b87a9d98ff38.label: text_chunk
03eb9ffe-b3b4-48f0-9503-b87a9d98ff38.text:
The remainder of this Agreement shall continue in full force and effect and the parties shall negotiate in good faith to replace the invalid or unenforceable provision with a valid, legal and enforceable provision which has an effect as close as possible to the provision or terms being replaced.

9.7.

decd6a30-cbf0-4ef3-a371-b766f5f17c12.label: text_chunk
decd6a30-cbf0-4ef3-a371-b766f5f17c12.text:

 validity and performance of this Agreement shall be governed by and construed under English Law, and for all matters arising under, out of, or in connection with the Agreement, they shall submit themselves to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English Courts.SIGNED by the duly authorised representatives of the parties on the date written at the beginning of this Agreement.For and on behalf of Acumen Business Systems Ltd. community_summary.0:
The relationships among the entities "Parties" and "Confidential Information" highlight two primary interactions: the disclosure and protection of confidential information. 

1. **Disclosure of Confidential Information**: The parties are engaged in discussions that necessitate sharing confidential information with each other, indicating a collaborative business relationship where transparency is essential for effective communication.

2. **Protection of Confidential Information**: The parties also seek to establish regulations governing the treatment of this confidential information, emphasizing the importance of safeguarding the interests of the party that owns the information. This aspect underscores a mutual understanding of the need for confidentiality and trust in their interactions.

Overall, the relationships illustrate a dual focus on both the sharing and safeguarding of sensitive information, which is crucial for maintaining a secure and productive business environment.
community_summary.1:
The relationships between the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party revolve around the sharing and management of Confidential Information. 

1. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party shares its Confidential Information with the Receiving Party as part of a formal agreement. This includes providing various types of information and materials, which are governed by legal obligations.

2. **Confidential Information Management**: The Disclosing Party is also responsible for receiving Confidential Information and has the right to be notified prior to any disclosures that may occur.

Overall, the interactions emphasize the legal and procedural framework that governs the exchange of sensitive information between the two parties, highlighting the Disclosing Party's role in both sharing and safeguarding Confidential Information.
community_summary.2:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Receiving Party and Permitted Disclosees**: The Receiving Party authorizes Permitted Disclosees to access Confidential Information, making them responsible for maintaining its confidentiality.

2. **Receiving Party and Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party is tasked with protecting Confidential Information, ensuring it remains confidential and is used in accordance with the terms of the Agreement. Additionally, the Receiving Party has an obligation to destroy all copies of the Confidential Information it receives, highlighting its responsibility in handling sensitive data.

3. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party receives information or materials from the Disclosing Party, typically under a confidentiality agreement, establishing a relationship centered on the exchange of sensitive information.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the Receiving Party's critical role in safeguarding Confidential Information, its authority to designate access to Permitted Disclosees, and its obligations regarding the destruction of sensitive data received from the Disclosing Party.

3. **Copyright Information**: The year 2015 is significant as it marks the copyright held by Acumen Business Systems Ltd, suggesting that any content produced or published by the company is protected under copyright law from that year.

Overall, the relationships highlight Acumen Business Systems Ltd's role as a provider of confidential information and operational frameworks, alongside its ownership of copyrighted material from 2015.

community_summary.16:
The relationships summarized below highlight the key aspects of an agreement and its implications for the parties involved:

1. **Agreement and Information Sharing**: The agreement governs the conditions under which information can be shared, emphasizing confidentiality obligations that must be adhered to by the parties.

2. **Framework for Business Relationship**: The agreement establishes a framework for the business relationship, detailing the management of confidential information between the involved parties.

3. **Obligations Regarding Confidential Information**: It outlines specific obligations concerning the handling of confidential information, which the parties are required to follow until the agreement is terminated.

4. **Entitlement to Attorneys' Fees**: The agreement entitles the prevailing party in any dispute to recover reasonable attorneys' fees and costs, providing a financial incentive for compliance and resolution.

5. **Enforcement by Court**: The agreement may be enforced or revised by a court if any of its provisions are deemed unenforceable, ensuring legal backing for the terms outlined.

Overall, the agreement serves as a critical document that not only governs the sharing of information and establishes business relationships but also sets forth obligations, entitlements, and mechanisms for enforcement.

This legal contract binds the involved parties to maintain the secrecy of sensitive data shared between them. The NDA plays a crucial role in ensuring that confidential information remains protected from unauthorized disclosure.
community_summary.18:
The relationships summarized involve clients and a non-solicitation agreement, as well as the partnership between BCG and another partner. 

1. **Clients and Non-solicitation Agreement**: Clients have entered into a mutual non-solicitation agreement, which prohibits them from soliciting each other's existing customers for business services. This indicates a collaborative effort to protect each other's client bases.

2. **BCG and Partner**: BCG and its partner have established a mutual non-solicitation agreement that prevents either party from soliciting or recruiting the other's employees, contractors, or affiliated resources. This agreement is effective during the term of their partnership and extends for twelve months after its conclusion, highlighting the importance of maintaining workforce integrity and stability.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the significance of mutual agreements in protecting business interests and resources among clients and partners.
community_summary.19: The relationship between Partner and BCG is characterized by a collaborative engagement, as both entities have entered into agreements to work together on joint customer business initiatives. This partnership signifies a commitment to collaboration and shared objectives in their business endeavors.
